mir:
task T014 {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)

  set relay1 = 1
  wait 500ms
  read water_sensor
  halt
}

task T015 {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)

  set relay1 = 0
  wait 500ms
  read water_sensor
  halt
}

task T016 {
  require cap(relay2)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)

  set relay2 = 1
  wait 500ms
  read temperature_sensor
  halt
}

task T017 {
  require cap(relay2)
  require cap(humidity_sensor)

  set relay2 = 0
  wait 500ms
  read humidity_sensor
  halt
}

task T018 {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)

  read relay1
  read water_sensor

  halt
}

task T019 {
  require cap(relay2)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)

  read relay2
  wait 10ms
  read temperature_sensor
  halt
}

task T020 {
  require cap(water_sensor)
  require cap(humidity_sensor)

  read water_sensor
  wait 100ms
  read humidity_sensor
  halt
}

task T024 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 50ms
  set relay1 = 0
  halt
}
